segments.speaker: system
segments.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

segments.speaker: agent
segments.text: Thanks for calling, how can I help today?

segments.speaker: customer
segments.text: I was charged a $35 overdraft fee that I do not think is right.

segments.speaker: agent
segments.text: I understand. As a one-time courtesy I will submit a request to waive the $35 fee, and it should post within 3 business days.

segments.speaker: agent
segments.text: I will also email you our current fee schedule today.

segments.speaker: customer
segments.text: Okay, thank you, that is helpful.
